zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III於1275年出生在荷蘭-拉藍德阿可爾時，他的父親Jan Herbaren II van Arkel21歲，母親Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg21歲。他於1293年與Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1324年12月24日在荷蘭-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾享年49歲，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭格利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III于1275年出生在荷兰-拉藍德阿可爾时，他的父亲Jan Herbaren II van Arkel21岁，母亲Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg21岁。他于1293年与Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1324年12月24日在荷兰-拉藍德希森蘭登阿可爾享年49岁，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭格利姆。

nameMeanings.name: Van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Arkel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Yoram, Yosef, Amram, Ari, Avi, Gitty, Haim, Ilan, Moshe, Yaacov, Yaakov.
Jewish: from the Biblical placename Ariel, meaning ‘lion of God’ in Hebrew (compare   Arie  ). It is mentioned in the prophecies of Ezra (8:16) and Isaiah (29:1–2).

variants.name: Arie
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the personal name Arye, meaning ‘lion’ in Hebrew.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III was born in 1275, in Arkel, South Holland, Netherlands, his father, Jan Herbaren II van Arkel, was 21 and his mother, Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, was 21. He married Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel in 1293. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 December 1324, in Arkel, Giessenlanden, South Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 49, and was buried in Gorinchem, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III est né en 1275, à Arkel, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, son père, Jan Herbaren II van Arkel, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel en 1293. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 décembre 1324, à Arkel, Giessenlanden, Hollande-Méridionale, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Gorinchem, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III 1275 in Arkel, Südholland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jan Herbaren II van Arkel 21 und seine Mutter Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg 21. Er hat 1293 Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. Dezember 1324 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Arkel, Giessenlanden, Südholland, Niederlande und wurde in Gorinchem, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III è nato il nel 1275 nel Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Jan Herbaren II van Arkel, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel nel 1293. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 dicembre 1324, nel Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Gorinchem, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Herbanen Van Arkel IIIが1275年にオランダズイド-hオランドアルケルで生まれた時，父Jan Herbaren II van Arkelは21歳，母Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburgは21歳であった。1293年にMabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkelと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1324年12月24日にオランダズイド-hオランドギエセンランデンアルケルで49歳で死去し，オランダホーランドゴリンケムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III(이)가 1275년 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 아클에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jan Herbaren II van Arkel(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1293년 Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1324년 12월 24일 네덜란드 주이드-홀랜드 기센랜든 아클에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 고린체에 묻혔다.

pt.Sint Pancras, Noord-Holland, Nederland: Sint Pancras, Holanda do Norte, Países Baixos
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III nasceu em 1275, em Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Jan Herbaren II van Arkel, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel em 1293. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de dezembro de 1324, em Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Baixos, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Gorinchem, Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III родился в 1275 г. в местности аркел, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Jan Herbaren II van Arkel было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel в 1293 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 декабря 1324 г. в местности аркел, гиессенланден, зуид-холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности горинчем, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Herbanen Van Arkel III nació en 1275, en Arkel, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Jan Herbaren II van Arkel, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Bertrade Geradsdr Van Sterkenburg, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Mabilia de Wael van Voorne van Arkel en 1293. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de diciembre de 1324, en Arkel, Giessenlanden, Zuid-Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Gorinchem, Holland, Países Bajos.
